texto: No one goes through this life unscathed. No matter what one sees in other people's lives that might seem better than one's own, that's only on the surface. No one knows what goes on beneath. Envy is an exercise in futility, since not one person gets out of this life alive.
explicacao: Citação de Doug Meckelson and Diane Haithman sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “No one goes through this life unscathed. No matter what one sees in other people's lives that mig…” articula reflexao, elder-holiday, gratefulness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como gratefulness e positive-thinking.
